title: Tala Glass Midi Measuring Cup, 100ml, Measures in ml, Tbsp, TSP & Fl oz, Small Glass Measuring Jug for Liquids & Dry Goods, Easy-to-Read, Dishwasher Safe
features: COMPACT AND VERSATILE MEASURING: Accurately measures up to 100ml, 6 tablespoons, 18 teaspoons, or 3 fluid ounces, ideal for both liquid and dry ingredients
EASY TO READ: Features precise metric and imperial measurements with bold markings for quick and convenient use in any kitchen
DURABLE GLASS: Made from strong, high-quality glass that's designed to last and resist staining, hot and cold temperatures
PERFECT FOR SMALL QUANTITIES: Great for measuring small amounts of ingredients when you don’t want to use a large jug, saves time and reduces washing up
EASY TO CLEAN: Dishwasher safe for effortless cleaning and compact enough to fit easily in drawers or small kitchen spaces
